name: blend_asymmetric_exp016
hypothesis: Phase-2 mechanism variant (last fair-game item: two-timescale blend rule): the compaction blend applies the SAME slow_decay to both Kronecker factors; making the value-factor Bk blend FASTER (slow_decay^2 vs slow_decay) than the key-factor A gives recent value-writes a quicker path into long-term state while keeping key structure more stable — an asymmetry the single slow_decay config knob cannot express. Faster Bk retention should also be more stable (less state accumulation). If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the blend asymmetry was the bottleneck; if not, the 5-item Phase-2 fair-game list is fully exonerated.
